turns.name: WILLIAM H. REHNQUIST
turns.text: The opinions of the Court in two cases will be announced by Justice White.

turns.name: BYRON R. WHITE
turns.text: One of these cases is from the Fifth Circuit, Blanchard against Bergeron. For the reasons stated in the opinion on file with the clerk, we reverse the judgment of the Court of Appeals. Justice Scalia has filed an opinion concurring in part and concurring in the judgment.
